reviews.comment:
Baje solo para ir al baño y comprar un café. Los.balis limpios y el shop muy bien surtido y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
I only went downstairs to use the restroom and buy a coffee. The balconies were clean, the shop was very well-stocked, and the service was good.

reviews.comment:
Ni chicha, ni limonada. Otra estación más del montón mediocre en cuanto atención y servicios. Los baños un desastre de sucios. Pónganle un poquito de ganas muchachos. Representan a nuestra empresa de bandera. Me parece que la imagen que brindan no es buena.

(Translated by Google)
Neither fish nor fowl. Yet another run-of-the-mill station, mediocre in terms of service and amenities. The bathrooms are a filthy mess. Put some effort into it, guys. You represent our flagship company. I don't think the image you're projecting is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNocmJyTmpRRRAB
